message: fix issue with 2024 all-ED encounter file
re-run epic to capture dates correctly
update proportions to be *100 for plotting pursposes and for consistency to old PopHIVE_Datahub pipeline
replace N with pct for Epic
fix issue with epic data upload
resolve age name issues in the ingest script
fix epic week dates to be saturday instead of sunday
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
clean up the age groupings for comparisons of obesity and diabetes in BRFSS and Cosmos
fix extension of files; rerun epic
replace xz with gz for Epic
